title: Campground Reservation Confirmation
text:
## Campground Reservation Confirmation

Dear {person},

Your site at {place} Campground is confirmed for {number} nights.

**Site:** {number}, near the {adjective} {animal} trail

**Check-in:** After {number} PM on {day of week}

**Rules:** No {verb ending in -ing} after dark, store {food} in the {object} locker, and keep {plural noun} inside your tent.

**Amenities:** {adjective} showers, one {color} picnic table, and a fire ring shaped like a {silly word}.

**Weather note:** Expect {adjective} skies and occasional {plural noun}.

See you under the {adjective} stars,

{person}, Camp Host
